description: From Besanon to Dijon, this majestic cruise between the Doubs valley and Burgundy will take you through authentic and traditional cities with different stories and hidden gems. You will be able to visit the Saline Royale of Arc-et-Senans, Dole or the charming city of Saint Jean-de-Losne, first river port of France home to the Muse de la Batellerie, recounting the history of navigation on inland waterways.

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board the ship in Amsterdam at 6:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail.

Join us for the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: Guided tour of Amsterdam in the historic heart of this beautiful capital city.DISCOVERY: Bike tour of Amsterdam. You'll be able to explore and learn about all the must-see and out-of-the-way sites.In the afternoon, join us on an optional excursion for both packages: Visit the Keukenhof Gardens(2). (only on pre-booking before departure). Outside the opening dates of the park, excursion to Volendam and the Zaanse Schans. Our ship will cruise to Nijmegen through the night.
Join us for the optional excursion for both packages: Visit of the Dutch Open Air Museum of Arnhem.

We'll spend the morning cruising to Cologne on what is known as the 'Romantic Rhine,' the dazzling section between Rdesheim and Koblenz.This afternoon, join us for the optional excursion for both packages: Guided walking tour of Cologne.

Our ship will cruise during the morning. When we arrive in Rdesheim, join us on the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: Depart by tourist train and stop at a wine tasting cellar, followed by a visit to the Museum of Mechanical Musical Instruments.DISCOVERY: Hiking through the vineyards in Rudesheim.
Our ship will cruise during the morning. Join us on an optional excursion for both packages: Visit of Heidelberg. Tonight is our gala dinner and evening.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.

description: Embark on a unique cruise in the heart of Venice to celebrate the New Year! Visit Venice and its famous landmarks such as San Marco Square and the Doge's Palace. Do not miss out on towns with unique architecture such as Padua, stretching around a charming medieval center dotted with small squares and grand palaces.

The sun deck with sun loungers is the perfect place to relax and admire the panoramic view of Venice.

whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

title: Lisbon, Porto and the Douro valley (Portugal) and Salamanca (Spain) (port-to-port cruise)
description: Cruise from Lisbon to Leverinho via Coimbra, Porto, Vila Real and Salamanca, you will discover the magnificent cities along our cruise. You will visit Porto and its famous wine route as well as Lisbon. The Portuguese capital has managed to find the subtle balance between its past heritage and modernity and will seduce you with its beautiful panoramas.
gallery: https://assets.widgety.co.uk/2026/02/20/19/37/07/9bf3c4a3-b953-4d16-9195-d8f93453eba7/CroisiEurope MS Miguel Torga - Exterior, Credit. Alexandre Sattler.jpg
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: We'll leave by coach for Coimbra, once the medieval capital of Portugal and the site of the country's largest university. Passengers are welcome to board our ship in Porto. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail. Tonight, join us on an optional excursion by coach for both packages: Tour of Porto 'by night'.

Join us for the optional excursions proposed :CLASSIC: Guided tour of Porto, one of the oldest cities in Europe, whose historic center was listed as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO.DISCOVERY: Touring Porto via tram and visiting the tram museum. We'll board one of the city's trams and partake in this urban-tourism experience all the way to the mouth of the Douro. We'll finish up our excursion with a tasting of some of the local specialties.After our tours, we'll return on board and spend the afternoon sailing. Enjoy an evening of entertainment.
Join us on an optional CLASSIC/DISCOVERY excursion : Casa de Mateus and the Douro Museum in Rgua.Tonight's evening will have a Spanish flair.

Join us for the optional excursions proposed :CLASSIC: Discover Salamanca, its unusual cathedral and its famous university dating back to 1218, making it one of the oldest in the world.DISCOVERY: Salamanca tapas tour.Tonight's our gala evening and dinner.
Join us on an optional CLASSIC/DISCOVERY excursion : Port Wine Route and Pinho.We'll spend the afternoon cruising. Enjoy an evening of traditional folk entertainment.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.

description: Cruise in the heart of Portugal and the Douro Valley. You'll have the chance to explore Lamego, city rich in heritage and tradition, or Guimares considered the beating heart of Portugal. You will also be amazed by the striking history of the tram museum in Porto or the Quaint Afurada.

title: Prague, Dresden, and the Castles of Bohemia: A Spectacular Cruise on the Elbe and Vltava Rivers
description: Discover the many hidden treasures of Bohemia on this exclusive itinerary. Reconnect with nature on excursions to top destinations set in idyllic landscapes along the Elbe and Vltava Rivers. Well visit Prague and Dresden, authentic cities that exude charm and boast a rich cultural and architectural history. The castles of Bohemia, symbols of the nobility and aristocracy, house many surprising works of art.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

title: Prestigious New Year's Eve in Paris (port to port)
description: Celebrate this New Year on the Seine River, at the heart of the unparalleled French capital! Sailing along the Canal Saint-Martin, the enchanting views and the warm atmosphere of this particular area will surely delight you. Paris welcomes you with open arms for an opportunity to marvel at its most emblematic sites such as the legendary Eiffel Tower, the Trocadero and Tuileries Gardens and the le Saint-Louis. In the charming district of Saint-Germain-des-Prs, immerse yourself in the Paris of yesteryear: elegant, unique, and romantic as ever.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

title: Prestigious Paris & and the Canal Saint-Martin (port-to-port cruise)
description: Embark on a Parisian getaway along the Canal Saint-Martin which offers a unique landscape to all lovers of the French capital and the ideal setting for a romantic cruise. You will be carried away by symbolic places such as the Eiffel Tower, the gardens of the Trocadro, the Tuileries Gardens and the island of Saint-Louis. You will also have a chance to explore the district of Saint-Germain-des-Prs, combining charm and elegance. Get ready to experience a memorable cruise!

title: Remarkable Sites and Fine Wines on a Cruise through the Doubs Valley and Burgundy (port-to-port cruise)
description: From Dijon to Besanon, this majestic cruise between Burgundy and the Doubs valley will take you through authentic and traditional cities with different stories and hidden gems. You will be able to visit the Saline Royale of Arc-et-Senans, Dole or the charming city of Saint-Jean-de-Losne, first river port of France home to the Muse de la Batellerie, recounting the history of navigation on inland waterways.

title: Revisit France's Past, its Royal Sites, and Medieval Cities during a Historic Cruise on the Petite Seine (port-to-port cruise)
description: Embark on an exceptional cruise along the Petite Seine and the Yonne, at the very heart of Frances rich history.From Sens to Paris, via Moret, Melun, and Fontainebleau, each stop immerses you in royal elegance, medieval heritage, and the bucolic charm of the countrys most beautiful historic towns.Discover architectural treasures such as the Cathedral of Sens, the chteaux of Vaux-le-Vicomte and Fontainebleau. Stroll through the picturesque streets of Barbizon and Moret, once a haven for Impressionist painters.A cultural and gourmet cruise, set against the backdrop of enchanting landscapes.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.description: The MS Deborah is a superb Premium canal barge, measuring 38,50 meters long and 5,07 meters wide. It can accommodate 22 passengers, in 11 cabins offering amenities and providing guests with all the comforts they need during their stay.

title: Royal New Year cruise on the Loire (port-to-port cruise)
description: Join us for a magical cruise along the Loire for an unforgettable New Year's Eve! Discover the many Chateaux of the Loire, Nantes and its historical treasures, or Saint-Nazaire where you can admire the shipyard where the Queen Mary II ship was built.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Loire Princesse
ship.description: The design of this ship is exclusive to CroisiEurope since it is the first French ship to sail on the Loire, the last "wild river" in France. Built in 2015 in Saint-Nazaire, its specificity lies in its side paddle wheels and shallow-draft. The noble burgundy and pearly colors mingle with copper elements, which give a prestigious

title: The Best of The Netherlands (port-to-port cruise)
description: Vacation in the Netherlands on an unforgettable cruise across the Markermeer and Dutch canals. Visit all the must-see sites, including Edam, Volendam, Gouda, the windmills of Kinderdijk, The Hague and the Mauritshuis, Haarlem, and the Rijksmuseum in Amsterdam.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Victor Hugo
ship.description: The MS Victor Hugo is named after one of the most famous figures in French literature. This attractive standard ship sails on the Tisza, Sava, Elbe, Rhine and Danube, rivers with a vast history and culture.
cabin_images: https://assets.widgety.co.uk/2024/08/19/11/14/08/fcaba1ef-f00b-4f59-8de2-e117a856857c/CroisiEurope, MS Victor Hugo, CAT. A - Upper Deck 2 Adjustable Twin Beds - ©David Bleuset.jpg

title: The Festival of Lights in Lyon (port-to-port cruise)
description: Take a pre-holiday break at Lyons annual Festival of Lightsa magical, ephemeral tradition dating back to 1852. At nightfall, as the citys beautiful buildings begin to glow, you'll experience an enchantment unique to Lyon.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.description: Inaugurated in 2015, this rivership with a bright and spacious interior joins the fleet of Premium rated ships.

title: Short Break in Paris (port-to-port cruise)
description: "Paris never ceases to amaze us, we think we know it, and then there is another surprise waiting for us around the corner". Paris, eternal, romantic, unusual, creative and modern: discover the city's architectural and cultural heritage. Along the Seine, embark on a unique cruise in the heart of the sublime French capital.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Renoir
ship.description: By adopting the “French chic” spirit, the ship’s design emphasises elegant and graphic classicism, inspired by the friendship between Coco Chanel and Auguste Renoir. Powder pink colours subtly alternate with dark grey tones which provide the ship with a warm atmosphere.
cabin_images: https://assets.widgety.co.uk/2024/08/05/11/55/58/05be7a32-e9af-43ba-b1d5-9c6e8560f2fd/CroisiEurope MS Renoir Upper Double Cabin ©Gregory Gerault 1.jpg

title: Solar Eclipse of 12 August 2026: Unforgettable Cruise through Andalusia for an Exceptional Celestial Spectacle (port-to-port cruise)
description: From Seville to Granada, this cruise will allow you to visit the cities and emblematic sites of this rich region of Spain. Discover Seville, the capital of Andalusia, which is full of joy and activity throughout its streets. You will be amazed by the old town which is home to amazing architecture and tradition. But also, by Jerez which has preserved an incredible architectural heritage.In addition to these cultural discoveries, enjoy an exceptional and magical experience with the observation of the total solar eclipse on 12 August 2026, a rare celestial spectacle in the heart of Andalusia.To extend the magic, a meteor shower will illuminate the Andalusian sky, offering an unforgettable end to the evening.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS La Belle de Cadix
ship.description: Lights, luscious and bright colors: welcome aboard the MS La Belle de Cadix, the only ship that combines river-maritime routes! On the program, flamenco, paella and sun-drenched fruit will slip aboard this ship with warm colors and many welcoming spaces, not to mention the swimming pool on the sun deck!

title: Stunning Window Displays and Christmas Markets in Paris  (port-to-port cruise)
description: A captivating tour of beguiling Paris, when the holiday season takes over the city and transforms it into a bright festival of lights and delights. Christmas markets spring up everywhere on streets decorated to the nines for the approaching holidays. A festive breeze spans Paris.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

title: Taking in 3 countries: The Danube and its traditions (port-to-port cruise)
description: Join us for a cruise in the heart of the major capitals along the Danube and discover the most enchanting Christmas markets in Europe. Stroll through beautiful squares and enchanting Christmas markets in Vienna, enjoying the scents of mulled wine and gingerbread perfuming the aisles between the wooden cabins. You can also visit the Christmas markets of Bratislava and Budapest where the local artisanship and culinary delights will bring the magic of Christmas to your heart.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Vivaldi
ship.description: The MS Vivaldi is named after one of the greatest virtuosos in the history of music, who notably composed “The Four Seasons”. The ship sails on the Danube, and takes passengers to discover the many wonders offered by this romantic river.

title: The Beautiful Blue Danube (port-to-port cruise)
description: From Budapest to Passau via Bratislava, Vienna and Melk, these cities rich in culture and history will unveil their secrets. Discover the Schoenbrunn Palace and the beautiful Wachau Valley, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. With its wooded hillsides, orchards, small villages, vineyards and monasteries, it is the most picturesque part of the Danube and where the majestic Drnstein Castle stands.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Douce France
ship.description: Completely renovated in 2017 according to the company’s new standards, this ship now offers much more spacious cabins with large bay windows on the upper deck. The soft and feminine decoration mixes shades of pink with aubergine and anise colors in the common areas. The cabins evoke a marine atmosphere.

title: The Must-see Sights of the Seine Valley (port-to-port cruise)
description: Embark on a cruise where heritage and history are as rich as they are exciting. Visit the iconic Palace of Versailles France at its most luxurious! Discover the Alabaster coast, bathed by the greeny blue waters of the Channel, offering the most impressive landscapes of Normandy. Visit Rouen, a real museum city, a memorable experience with its beautiful half-timbered houses, cobbled streets and Gothic churches.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Seine Princess
ship.description: The MS Seine Princess sails along a river with splendid and contrasting landscapes, which in particular inspired the greatest impressionist painters. History and art lovers, as well as those who love beautiful scenery, will be delighted by the cruises from Paris to Honfleur aboard the MS Seine Princess.

title: The Rhine & Moselle
description: From Cochem to Strasbourg, discover the magic of the Moselle and the romantic Rhine valley on an exceptional cruise where rivers meander between breath-taking landscapes and castles dominating hillsides. Explore authentic towns and villages with hidden gems, such as Alken and its Thurant castle, or stroll in Boppard along one of the most beautiful banks of Germany.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Monet
ship.description: Named after one of the most famous impressionist painters, Claude Monet, this elegant ship sails on the Rhine and the Danube. It takes cruise passengers to discover the many wonders offered by these two romantic rivers.

title: The Rhine as a Legacy: Art, History and Heritage. Discovering Europe's Geniuses and Masterpieces (port-to-port cruise)
description: Embark on a unique cruise along the Rhine. From iconic cities to fascinating museums, this journey invites you to explore the art, history, and architecture that have shaped the region. Each stop offers the opportunity to discover masterpieces, stroll through historic sites, and immerse yourself in Europes cultural heritage. Between guided tours and lectures, you will enjoy a rich and immersive itinerary. Eight days of discovery await you, blending curiosity, knowledge, and wonder as you travel along the river. A cultural adventure where every panorama and every monument tells its own story.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

title: The Romantic Rhine Valley and the Rock of Lorelei (port-to-port cruise)
description: Discover the Rhine Valley and the legend of the famous Lorelei rock! It is said that a beautiful maiden threw herself into the Rhine in despair over a faithless lover and was transformed into a siren who lured fishermen to destruction. Embark on a surprising cruise through sublime landscapes that will take you to Koblenz and Rdesheim, known for its vineyards and traditional cafes.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Douce France
ship.description: Completely renovated in 2017 according to the company’s new standards, this ship now offers much more spacious cabins with large bay windows on the upper deck. The soft and feminine decoration mixes shades of pink with aubergine and anise colors in the common areas. The cabins evoke a marine atmosphere.

title: The Seine Valley (port-to-port cruise)
description: Sail along the Seine to discover the history, idyllic landscapes and culture that border this mythical river with its hidden secrets. In Vernon, you will discover the Claude Monet house and gardens with its famous water garden. Visit the sumptuous Martainville Chteau, stroll along the Cte Fleurie or vist the historical Normandy landing beaches.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Seine Princess
ship.description: The MS Seine Princess sails along a river with splendid and contrasting landscapes, which in particular inspired the greatest impressionist painters. History and art lovers, as well as those who love beautiful scenery, will be delighted by the cruises from Paris to Honfleur aboard the MS Seine Princess.

title: The The Soul of Christmas in Andalusia: Cruise to the Heart of the Nativity, embracing Spain's festive traditions and enchanting Christmas markets (port-to-port cruise)
description: Experience the magic of Christmas in Andalusia and discover its history through its festive traditions. The Nativity scenes of Seville highlight the local craftsmanship, with meticulously sculpted figurines and majestic decorations full of details. The enchantment of Spanish Christmas customs lies in the sharing and conviviality of festive moments, elevated by local gastronomy, songs, and the beauty of Christmas decorations. A landmark city in Spanish history, Seville, where Christian and Muslim cultures thrived together, inherits from its rich past architectural treasures, notably the Palacio de Las Dueas.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS La Belle de Cadix
ship.description: Lights, luscious and bright colors: welcome aboard the MS La Belle de Cadix, the only ship that combines river-maritime routes! On the program, flamenco, paella and sun-drenched fruit will slip aboard this ship with warm colors and many welcoming spaces, not to mention the swimming pool on the sun deck!

description: Discover breathtaking landscapes along 3 rivers: the romantic Rhine valley, the Moselle and the Main. Impressive and unforgettable, our cruise will let you discover unmissable cities, from Strasbourg to the Cochem castle, via the Frankfurt Main Tower, the Niederwald monument and Heidelberg.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

title: The beautiful blue Danube (port-to-port cruise)
description: From Passau to Budapest via Melk and Vienna, these cities rich in culture and history will unveil their secrets. Discover the Schoenbrunn Palace and the beautiful Wachau Valley, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. With its wooded hillsides, orchards, small villages, vineyards and monasteries, it is the most picturesque part of the Danube and where the majestic Drnstein Castle stands.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS France
ship.description: Partially renovated in 2016, the ship takes on a sparkling and vintage look with its anise and chocolate colors. The houndstooth-type patterns recall the elegant outfits of ladies from the sixties. The cabins display retro photographs representing Parisian monuments.

title: The finest and most picturesque ports of call in the Seine valley (port-to-port cruise)
description: Sail along the Seine and set out to discover unique and unusual places. From Paris to Honfleur, through the majestic landscapes of the Alabaster Coast and the historic treasures of Rouen, this cruise invites you to explore the richness of Normandy and the timeless charm of the capital. Between authentic stopovers and immersive excursions, get ready to sail through a postcard-perfect setting, where heritage, nature, and the French art of living come together.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

title: Through authentic Holland (port-to-port cruise)
description: Be carried away by the history of Holland through its culture and the rustic charm of the cities of Amsterdam, Gouda and Rotterdam. During your cruise, you will discover the traditional Delftware, famous for its finesse and the quality of its enamelling.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Victor Hugo
ship.description: The MS Victor Hugo is named after one of the most famous figures in French literature. This attractive standard ship sails on the Tisza, Sava, Elbe, Rhine and Danube, rivers with a vast history and culture.

title: Timeless Venice (port-to-port package)
description: Set off on a cruise to experience quintessential Venice. Dive into the art of gondola and mask making. Indulge in fine Venetian cuisine and enjoy authentic cicchetti at the edge of the Grand Canal. Find some respite from bustling Venetian life on the charming island of Burano. To top it all off, discover hillside villa masterpieces from the Renaissance.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Michelangelo
ship.description: The size of this ship allows it to cruise the Venetian Lagoon and to moor close to Saint Mark's Square!The restaurant is located at the back of the main deck and the lounge / bar at the front. The sun deck with sun loungers is the perfect place to relax and admire the panoramic view of Venice.

description: What city can conjure up romantic images more than Venice? If you have dreamed of admiring the city from a gondola, standing in Saint Marks Square, or indulging in the fine food found on almost every corner, join us for a cruise through the calm waters and enchanting panoramas in the Venetian Lagoon.

title: Venice at your pace (port-to-port package)
description: Discover Venice at your own pace on a cruise aboard a floating hotel ideally located in the heart of the city. Soak up the enchanting atmosphere while enjoying complete freedom to organise your day, with half-board included. Venice, the city of canals, offers a multitude of possibilities for travellers. Art lovers can admire artistic masterpieces in the city's museums and churches. Gourmets can sample the local cuisine, with specialities such as cicchetti in the bacari. There's something for everyone.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

ship.name: MS Michelangelo
ship.description: The size of this ship allows it to cruise the Venetian Lagoon and to moor close to Saint Mark's Square!The restaurant is located at the back of the main deck and the lounge / bar at the front. The sun deck with sun loungers is the perfect place to relax and admire the panoramic view of Venice.

title: Venice, the epicenter of art, and its famous lagoon (port-to-port package)
description: Discover works in all shapes and sizes throughout Venice. Begin the trip at the fabulous Scuola Grande di San Rocco, a treasure trove of stunning works by Tintoretto and several of his assistants. Captivating frescoes transport us to the epic time known as the Venetian Renaissance. In Burano, learn about the delicate craft of lacemaking at the local museum. Talented artists have sustained traditional methods over the centuries, creating exquisite pieces evoking tales about the picturesque island. Vicenza, listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site, welcomes you with open arms. Explore the Teatro Olimpico, one of Andrea Palladio's masterpieces, and immerse yourself in the dramatic elegance found in the Italian Renaissance. Lastly, the pice de rsistance: a coveted entry to the major international event known as Biennale Artecelebrating innovation and contemporary artistic expression. This is a timeless cruise, where each port-of-call becomes a work of art in itself.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

title: An Enchanting Christmas Getaway between Ghent and Bruges (port-to-port cruise)
description: Discover the Christmas markets along the Belgian Canals. Located in northern Belgium, vibrant Ghent and charming Bruges are magical destinations, each with its own unique aura. In December, the two cities dress up in their finest for all to see.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: Possibility of coach transfer between Brussels and Ghent.(1) Boarding.Included excursion: Guided tour of the Christmas market in Ghent.(3)Well introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail.
This morning's included excursion is a guided tour of Ghent and a tasting of local specialties.Afternoon cruise to Aalter.
Well spend the morning cruising. Included excursion: Bruges, its Christmas market, and a brewery.(2)Festive gala evening.
Disembarkation.Possibility of coach transfer between Bruges and Brussels.(1)

ship.name: MS Raymonde
ship.description: A cruise aboard a canal barge promises a peaceful break where you take the time to discover “la douce France” in a different way. The MS Raymonde a true cocoon of charm, sails on the French canals and offers its passengers an original and authentic experience.

title: A cruise in Aquitaine : the great wines of Southern France (port-to-port cruise)
description: Let yourself be carried by an inspiring cruise along the Garonne and the Dordogne. This will transport you to the heart of Bordeaux and its region. You will discover this unmissable and surprising city many of whose monuments are listed as World Heritage Sites by UNESCO, and visit the Blaye citadel which majestically dominates the estuary.

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 6:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail and evening.

We'll begin towards Cussac-Fort-Mdoc.In the afternoon, join us for the optional CLASSIC / DISCOVERY excursion proposed: Following the trail of the grands crus wines of Mdoc* (only on pre-booking before departure), a renowned region where the most famous of all red wines in the world are cultivated.We'll return on board for dinner and an evening of entertainment.

We'll start sailing early this morning towards Blaye, whose Citadel built by Vauban is not to be missed. Join us on the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: Blaye and a visit to its citadel in a tourist train, plus a tastingof regional products and wine: Set off to discover the history and heritage ofBlaye and its citadel. Built by Vabaun under Louis the Great, the citadelprotected Bordeaux from invasions as part of the Verrou Vauban with theForts Pt and Mdoc. This three-garrison defense system is unique inFrance and has been listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Afterwards, we'llvisit the Chteau Marquis de Vauban restaurant for a tasting of wine and someregional products.DISCOVERY: Tour Blaye and its underground monuments on foot. After our tour, we'll get to taste some regional products with an excellent glass of wine*.We'll return on board and cruise on the Gironde all the way to the estuary. Enjoy an evening of dancing.

We'll cruise to Libourne, a town rich with history and full of character located at the confluence with the Isle and the Dordogne Rivers. Upon arrival, join us on the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: tour of Saint-Emilion.DISCOVERY: Libourne by bike and wine tasting*.We'll return on board in Libourne. Tonight is our festive gala dinner and evening.

We'll cruise towards Bordeaux this morning. Join us on the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: The Chartrons District, Wine and Commerce Museum.DISCOVERY: The Bassins des Lumires.Enjoy an evening of entertainment.

Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.      For an optimal organization of the cruise, the organization of excursions can be modified according to the tide.  Note to coach: double-decker buses are not allowed on many roads in Gironde, including Libourne, Saint Emilion, Blaye and Cadillac.

title: Andalusian New Year (port-to-port cruise)
description: Enjoy a cruise on the Guadalquivir this New Year and discover the famous cities of Andalusia such as Seville with its tremendous heritage and old town center that houses fascinating monuments. Explore Cadiz and its surroundings and discover Roman theaters and medieval castles alike.

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 5:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail before dinner.
Join us on an optional guided tour of Seville. The afternoon will be spent cruising towards Cdiz.

Join us on an optional guided tour of Cdiz. This marvelous city famed for the beauty of its unique landscapes will surprise you with its cultural and historical riches. In the afternoon, we'll cruise toward El Puerto de Santa Maria(2). Enjoy a free afternoon or join us on an optional excursion to the Osborne Bodega with a tasting of local wines*. Tonight is our gala dinner and evening.
Join us on an optional excursion to Jerez. We'll then cruise to Seville. Tonight is our special New Year's Eve dinner and evening.
Join us on an optional tour of Crdoba, city of the Caliphs. Enjoy a free afternoon to discover the city at your own pace. We'll then return to Seville. The evening is free to do as you please.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.

title: Family Cruise in Bordeaux-The Land and its History (port-to-port cruise)
description: Take the whole family on a river cruise vacation to the magnificent city of Bordeaux and the beautiful surrounding area. Explore all the surprising aspects of one of the greatest French cities, including its monuments listed as UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Discover the history of a rich, authentic land. Visit the fortified cities of Blaye and Cussac-Fort-Mdoc. And don't forget to taste some of France's most coveted wines!

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 6:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail and evening.

We'll begin towards Cussac-Fort-Mdoc.In the afternoon, Join us on the optional excursions proposed:- CLASSIC: Following the trail of the grands crus wines of Mdoc* (only on pre-booking before departure), a renowned region where the most famous of all red wines in the world are cultivated.- FAMILY: The Conquest of Fort Medoc. Free activity. The Fort Mdoc is a military complex that was built in the 17th century to protect the area from possible enemy attacks via the waterways.

We'll start sailing early this morning towards Blaye, whose Citadel built by Vauban is not to be missed. Join us on the optional excursions proposed:- CLASSIC: Blaye and a visit to its citadel in a tourist train, plus a tastingof regional products and wine: Set off to discover the history and heritage ofBlaye and its citadel. Built by Vabaun under Louis the Great, the citadelprotected Bordeaux from invasions as part of the Verrou Vauban with theForts Pt and Mdoc. This three-garrison defense system is unique inFrance and has been listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Afterwards, we'llvisit the Chteau Marquis de Vauban restaurant for a tasting of wine and someregional products.- FAMILY: Treasure hunt at the Blaye Citadel entryway.We'll return on board and cruise on the Gironde all the way to the estuary. Enjoy an evening of dancing.

We'll cruise to Libourne, a town rich with history and full of character located at the confluence with the Isle and the Dordogne Rivers. Upon arrival, join us on the optional excursion for both packages:tour of Saint-Emilion.We'll return on board in Libourne.Tonight is our festive gala dinner and evening.

We'll cruise towards Bordeaux this morning. Join us on the optional excursions proposed:- CLASSIC: The Chartrons District, Wine and Commerce Museum.- FAMILY: The Bassins des Lumires.Enjoy an evening of entertainment.

Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.      For an optimal organization of the cruise, the organization of excursions can be modified according to the tide.  Note to coach: double-decker buses are not allowed on many roads in Gironde, including Libourne, Saint Emilion, Blaye and Cadillac.

title: Budapest, the Pearl of the Danube (port-to-port cruise)
description: See the biggest river parade in Europe: the Iron Gates, on the border of Romania and Serbia. It is here that the beautiful blue Danube unveils its most spectacular landscapes. Discover cities such as Belgrade, a young and modern capital, as well as legendary sites such as Baile Herculane which houses one of the oldest and most famous spas in Romania. Travel through 2000 years of history in Pcs and Budapest, which will end a magical cruise and a journey of a life time.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 6:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail. Enjoy dinner and an evening of onboard entertainment. We'll cruise throughout the night.
The morning will be spent cruising. We'll then set out on an optional excursion to Osijek. Our ship will start sailing to Belgrade. After dinner, enjoy an evening of onboard entertainment.

Join us on an optional excursion to Belgrade, cradle of the Austro-Hungarian, Ottoman and Slavic cultures. Take advantage of some free time this afternoon to visit the city. Optional coach transfer (book and pay on board) to and from the town centre. Enjoy dinner and an evening of traditional Serbian entertainment on board. Our ship will start sailing to Golubac.
Our ship will start sailing through the Iron Gates. Join us on an optional excursion to the Medieval Golubac Fortress. Our ship will start sailing to Novi Sad throughout the night.

We'll set out on an optional visit of Novi Sad, the capital city of the autonomous region of Vojvodina.We'll then head to Ilok on an optional excursion to visit the medieval city and taste some local products. After dinner, enjoy an evening of onboard entertainment. Our ship will start sailing to Mohacs throughout the night.

Join us on an optional excursion to Pcs, a 2000-year-old jewel of a city. The afternoon will be spent cruising. We'll head out on an optional excursion to the Puszta. Our ship will then start sailing to Budapest. Tonight's our gala dinner and evening.

We'll arrive early this morning and set out for an optional tour of Budapest. The afternoon will be free or dedicated to an optional excursion to Gdll Palace, summer residence of Sissi Empress. Tonight, join us on a tour of Budapest "by night".
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.

ship.name: MS Modigliani
ship.description: Named in honor of the famous Italian painter, known in particular for his portraits, the MS Modigliani sails on the Rhine and the Danube. It takes cruise passengers to discover the many wonders offered by these two romantic rivers.

title: Christmas in Venice (port-to-port cruise)
description: Embark on a magical cruise in the heart of Venice to celebrate Christmas. Visit Venice and its famous landmarks such as San Marco Square and the Doge's Palace. You will also have the chance to attend Christmas mass in Venice. Do not miss out on towns with unique architecture such as Padua, stretching around a charming medieval center dotted with small squares and grand palaces.
gallery: https://assets.widgety.co.uk/2019/02/08/12/38/58/a6e5b524-d637-425e-8c7a-6bdc293791f0/ITCVV - Venice - San Giorgio Maggiore - andreas nextvoyagepl.jpg
https://assets.widgety.co.uk/2019/02/08/12/38/58/85fd9556-9283-4f55-b32e-336951cb3fe4/ITCVV - Venice - Sunrise in Venice - marco secchi.jpg

https://assets.widgety.co.uk/2019/02/08/12/39/00/24adc15a-92a2-4a5f-9399-992fc32d518e/ITCVV - Venice - Venician Lady - ingeborg gartner grein.jpg
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 6:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail.

We'll cruise through the magnificent bay of Venice all the way to Chioggia. This afternoon, we'll set out on an optional guided tour of Padua, which is probably one of the most important artistic towns in Italy. Afterwards, we'll cruise back to Venice. Enjoy time on your own this evening.

This morning, enjoy free time in Venice or join us on an optional excursion via private boat to visit the islands of the Venetian Lagoon: Burano, famous for its lacework, and Murano, home to Venice's glassmaking industry since the late 13th century. This afternoon, join us for an optional guided tour of the Doge's Palace and St. Mark's Square. Tonight is our Christmas Eve dinner and evening. Midnight Mass will be celebrated in Venice(2-3).
Enjoy a free day in Venice. Tonight is our gala dinner and evening.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking in Venice at 10:00 a.m. End of our services.

ship.name: MS Michelangelo
ship.description: The size of this ship allows it to cruise the Venetian Lagoon and to moor close to Saint Mark's Square!The restaurant is located at the back of the main deck and the lounge / bar at the front. The sun deck with sun loungers is the perfect place to relax and admire the panoramic view of Venice.

title: Christmas markets in Alsace (port-to-port)
description: Discover the Alsatian Christmas markets! Deeply rooted in the history of the region, Christmas traditions in Alsace are unique and particularly enchanting. You will be amazed by all that the markets have to offer, with of course the traditional mulled wine, crafts, magical lighting and much more.
gallery: https://assets.widgety.co.uk/2020/04/02/13/14/43/95671914-b4a2-42f6-b315-cf5266ca4d7c/FRSXB - Strasbourg - Eglise Saint-Paul - Credits Christian Wagner.jpg

whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: We'll meet in Strasbourg at 6.00 p.m. Tonight enjoy dinner on board and a free evening.

We'll set out on a discovery tour of the Wine Route with our hostess. You'll be enchanted by its picturesque villages wonderfully decorated for Christmas. We'll visit a wine cellar followed by a tasting of local Alsatian wines*. In the afternoon, we'll discover the Christmas Markets in Colmar. In the wonderful setting of the old town, the beautifully decorated streets will invite you to linger and daydream. Our coach will take us back to Strasbourg. Dinner during navigation.We'll spend the night on board.
Included Excursion Day: Strasbourg and Christmas Markets.Accommodation on board.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board. End of our services at 9:00 a.m.

ship.name: MS France
ship.description: Partially renovated in 2016, the ship takes on a sparkling and vintage look with its anise and chocolate colors. The houndstooth-type patterns recall the elegant outfits of ladies from the sixties. The cabins display retro photographs representing Parisian monuments.

title: Advent Lights and Winter Charm: Set Course for Venice and its Lagoon (port-to-port cruise)
description: Set off to discover Venice and its lagoon as Christmas approaches, when the city begins to sparkle with light. Between shimmering canals, majestic palaces and picturesque alleyways, every moment reveals the artistic and festive soul of La Serenissima. This unique cruise invites you to explore the exceptional heritage of Venice, the colourful village of Burano, and the enchanting atmosphere of Padua, while enjoying unforgettable cultural experiences: concerts, local craftsmanship and Advent traditions. A journey along the water where colours, lights and emotions blend together to create lasting memories.

itinerary.description: Boarding.
Morning, included excursion: guided tour of the Doges Palace.Afternoon: free time to explore St. Marks Square in the Christmas atmosphere.Evening: concert at San Vidal Church.

Included excursion: visit of the Dorsoduro district and the Basilica of Santa Maria della Salute.Cruise towards Mazzorbo.Included excursion: Burano, the spirit of Advent.Return on board in Venice.Evening entertainment.
Morning, sailing across the lagoon to Chioggia.Sweet tasting onboard with regional specialties.Afternoon, included excursion: experience the Magic of Christmas in Padua.Gala evening.
Disembarkation.

title: An Enchanting Cruise: Exploring the Christmas Markets in Ghent and Bruges (port-to-port cruise)
description: Discover the Christmas markets along the Belgian Canals. Located in northern Belgium, vibrant Ghent and charming Bruges are magical destinations, each with its own unique aura. In December, the two cities dress up in their finest for all to see.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: Possibility of coach transfer between Brussels and Bruges.(1) Boarding.Included excursion: Guided tour of the Christmas market in Bruges.Well introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail.
Included excursion in the morning: Guided tour of Bruges and a tour and tasting at the Bourgogne des Flandres brewery.(2)Afternoon cruise to Aalter.
Well spend the morning cruising. Included excursion in Ghent: Guided tour of the Ghent Christmas market(3) and a tasting of local specialties.Festive gala evening.
Disembarkation.Possibility of coach transfer between Ghent and Brussels.(1)

ship.name: MS Raymonde
ship.description: A cruise aboard a canal barge promises a peaceful break where you take the time to discover “la douce France” in a different way. The MS Raymonde a true cocoon of charm, sails on the French canals and offers its passengers an original and authentic experience.

title: Christmas Markets along the Rhine (port-to-port package)
description: Christmas markets are in full boom during the holiday season. The smell of freshly baked goods fills the air surrounding the festive wooden booths selling artisan gifts. We'll visit several markets during this cruise for an authentic German holiday experience, including those in Speyer, romantic Heidelberg, the Christmas Market of Nations in Rdesheim, and Koblenz.

Cruise to Koblenz.Optional excursion: Koblenz, the Ehrenbreitstein Fortress, and free time at the Christmas market.

We'll spend the morning cruising the romantic Rhine River to Rdesheim.Optional excursion: Tour of the city by tourist train, a visit to the mechanical music cabinet museum, and free time at the Christmas market.(2)In the evening, Drosselgasse awaits you with its numerous cafs, bars, and music.
We'll spend the morning cruising to Speyer. Enjoy some free time in Speyer OR optional excursion: Heidelberg and its Christmas Market.Our ship will cruise to Strasbourg.
Disembarkation.

ship.description: The MS Mona Lisa is named after Leonardo da Vinci’s most famous work. An intimate sized standard ship which sails on the Elbe, the Danube and the Rhine, rivers with many cultural and natural treasures.

title: Christmas in the Bordeaux region (port-to-port cruise)
description: Embark on a magical cruise through the Gironde. You will be able to celebrate Christmas all along this journey where you will discover the most precious secrets of the region. After a refined Christmas Eve dinner, you have the option to go to mass in Bordeaux. Your stay will also be the opportunity to discover the Grands Crus Wine Route of the Medoc as well as Blaye.

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 6:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail before dinner. We'll set sail towards Cussac-Fort-Mdoc.

Join us for an optional excursion through the Mdoc (only on pre-booking before departure), a prestigious wine-growing region. We'll return to the ship and cruise towards Blaye.Join us for an optional excursion: Blaye and a visit to its citadel in a tourist train, plus a tasting of regional.Tonight is our Christmas Eve dinner and evening. Enjoy midnight mass in Bordeaux(2-3).
This morning will be spent cruising towards Libourne. Enjoy an afternoon of onboard entertainment. Tonight is our gala dinner and evening.
Join us on an optional excursion to Saint-Emilion and a visit to a local winegrower's. The afternoon will be spent crusing. After dinner, join us on an optional guided tour of Bordeaux by night.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.

title: Hiking cruise through the Rhine Valley - History, traditions, and the spirit of the Rhineland (port-to-port cruise)
description: Board on a hiking cruise through the Romantic Rhine Valley.Enjoy the perfect balance of leisurely cruising and immersive walks through the natural beauty of the Rhineland. This cruise is ideal for active travelers seeking authenticity, breathtaking landscapes, and meaningful encounters with local history. Breathe in the fresh air, set off on invigorating hikes, and let the Rhine tell you its timeless story.Each stop is a new adventure: terraced vineyards in Rdesheim, panoramic viewpoints over the Rhine Valley, scenic ridge paths above the Neckar, and a succession of charming villages, castles, and abbeys scattered along the way. Accompanied by passionate and knowledgeable guides, youll follow a program specially designed to combine physical activity, wonder, and relaxation.

itinerary.description: Boarding.After comfortably settling into your cabins, well introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail.Our ship will sail through the night toward Koblenz.
A day cruising towards Koblenz along the most beautiful stretch of the Romantic Rhine. Discover Koblenz with our onboard team.Evening at leisure in Koblenz.

Morning cruising towards Rdesheim through the beautiful Romantic Rhine Valley.Included excursions:- HIKERS: Hike through the vineyards of Rdesheim.- NON-HIKERS: Tourist train, wine tasting, and the mechanical music museum in Rdesheim.In the evening, the famous Drosselgasse awaits, with its many wine taverns and orchestras.
Morning cruising towards Mannheim.Included excursions:- HIKERS: Hike along the Neckar River in Heidelberg.- NON-HIKERS: Guided tour of Heidelberg.Gala evening on board.
Disembarkation.

ship.name: MS La Boheme
ship.description: It is the title of an opera by Giacomo Puccini and a song by Charles Aznavour, but also the name of a historic region of central Europe, famous for its crystal. The MS La Bohème sails on the Danube and the Rhine, taking cruise passengers to meet the many wonders offered by these two romantic rivers.

title: Cruise Festival: French Cuisine and Impressionism on the Seine River
description: Join us for a cruise filled with fine cuisine, beautiful sites, and engaging history combined with dazzling Impressionist paintings and artists.Explore the locations that inspired the movement, such as Rouen and Honfleur. The Cte d'Albtre, bathed in the green and blue waters of the English Channel, is home to the best Normandy has to offer.

itinerary.description: Boarding.We'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail.Cruise through Paris by night, backed by a variety of popular French songs.Our ship will cruise to Les Andelys overnight.

We'll spend the morning cruising the twists and turns of the Seine Riverthe source of inspiration for many artistsuntil we reach Les Andelys.Onboard presentation: "The Seine River during the Time of the Impressionists."Included excursion: Visit Vernon and the Blanche Hosched-Monet Museum, with its collection of Impressionist paintings.Cruise to Honfleur overnight.
Included excursions:- Honfleur- The Cte d'AlbtreOur ship will cruise to Rouen overnight.
Included excursion: Rouen.We'll spend the afternoon cruising to Paris.Festive gala evening.
Disembarkation.

ship.name: MS Seine Princess
ship.description: The MS Seine Princess sails along a river with splendid and contrasting landscapes, which in particular inspired the greatest impressionist painters. History and art lovers, as well as those who love beautiful scenery, will be delighted by the cruises from Paris to Honfleur aboard the MS Seine Princess.

title: Family Club - A trip to admire the beautiful scenery of the Rhône valley (port-to-port cruise)
description: Discover the authentic Provence combining style and refinement. Throughout this cruise, you will be able to admire the beautiful Rhone landscapes. Discover Les Baux de Provence, one of the most beautiful, majestic and exotic villages in France, and plunge into the heart of an extraordinary setting whose charm and fragrance will captivate you. Visit the Alpilles where nature and authentic traditions have been carefully preserved.

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 3:00 p.m. We'll spend the afternoon cruising. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail. Dinner tonight will be following by an evening of entertainment. Our ship will cruise through the night.

This morning will be spent cruising to Avignon.Join us for the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: Guided tour of Avignon and the Papal Palace.FAMILY:Fun for all ages at the Papal Palace. The Papal Palace is a magical place for everyoneyoung and old. Adults will adore its grandeur. Curious kids will find the secrets hidden within its impressive walls intriguing. Is it a castle? A palace? A fortress? Set off on a fun-filled tour and discover for yourselves!Our ship will cruise to Arles.In the evening, join us on an optional CLASSIC/DISCOVERY excursion : Guided tour of Arles, a highly cultural town enriched with vestiges from the Roman Empire.

This morning, join us for theoptional excursion for both packages:Discovering the Camargue.The afternoon will be spent cruising to Martigues. Enjoy some free time exploring the city on your own before we set off once again for Arles.
Join us for the optional excursion for both packages: Discover the Baux-de-Provence.Cruise to Viviers.

This morning will be spent cruising to La Voulte. Join us for the CLASSIC optional excursion proposed: Discover the Vercors and taste the famous Clairette de Die*.For kids, our certified youth leaders will organize an onboard crafting session. Once we arrive in Tain-l'Hermitage, kids will set out on a treasure hunt by following seven puzzles focusing on the city's curiositiesincluding a photo challenge at each stop.After our tour, we'll return on board the ship in Tain-l'Hermitage. Enjoy our festive gala evening while the ship cruises to Lyon.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.

ship.name: MS Van Gogh
ship.description: Completely renovated in 2018, this ship has been redesigned and refitted according to the new standards of the company and offers larger, bright and comfortable spaces. In terms of decoration, the colour combination of gray blue and orange creates a lot of style and elegance. In a nod to the artist whose name it takes, the ship showcases some of his famous paintings, including those from the Sunflowers series. The patterns of the fabrics as well as the dressing of the bar follow the techniques developed by Van Gogh: impressionism and pointillism.

title: From Basel to Amsterdam : The Treasures of the Celebrated Rhine River (port-to-port cruise)
description: From Basel to Amsterdam, embark on a cruise rich in history and authenticity. Admire the beauty of the Rhine Falls before discovering historic monuments through cities such as Haarlem or Colmar and its Unterlinden museum. You can take a stroll to the Arnhem Open Air Museum, which reveals a 100-year-old story.

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 6 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail. We'll enjoy dinner on board.Navigation towards Breisach.
In the morning, free time in Breisach.(6)This afternoon, join us on an optional excursion for both packages: Guided tour of Colmar and the Unterlinden Museum(3).Enjoy an evening of entertainment.

We'll arrive in Strasbourg early this afternoon. Optional excursion for both packages: Boat tour of Strasbourg and a visit to its cathedral (7) (only on pre-booking before departure).Enjoy an evening of dancing as our ship starts sailing towards Mainz.

Join us for the optional excursion proposed: Guided tour of Mainz and the Gutenberg Museum.(5)We'll return on board and cruise up the most beautiful part of the Rhine River towards Koblenz, passing numerous castles as well as the infamous Lorelei Rock along the way. This evening, join our hostess for a tour of the city.

We'll depart for Cologne, reaching it later this morning. Join us on an optional excursion for both packages: Guided tour of Cologne on foot. Our tour will allow you to wonder at the majestic cathedral, the old town as well as the famous Fragrance Museum (exterior only.) Enjoy time at leisure in the city before we head back to the ship in Dsseldorf by coach. Tonight is our gala dinner and evening.

Join us on an optional excursion for both packages: Guided tour of the open-air museum in Arnhem. Meanwhile, our ship cruises towards Nijmegen where we'll board it again after our tour. Enjoy an evening of entertainment.

This morning, join us for the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: AmsterdamDISCOVERY: Bike tour of Amsterdam in search of its most secret and unique locations.In the afternoon, join us on an optional excursion for both packages: Visit the Keukenhof Gardens(1)(only on pre-booking before departure). Outside the opening dates of the park, guided tour of Haarlem.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.

ship.description: The symphony, the most important musical composition, is in perfect harmony with this superb Premium ship to which it gave its name. The MS Symphonie offers cruise itineraries on the Rhine and the Danube, romantic rivers par excellence.

title: From the Canals of Venice to Renaissance-infused Mantua & Milan and Lake Como Extended Stay (port-to-port cruise)
description: From Venice to Mantua, enjoy a unique cruise through the heart of three Italian regions. The region of Veneto opens its doorsand invites you to discover Venice, famous Saint Mark's Square and Doge's Palace, the official residence of Venetian dukes. Lombardy welcomes you next with its breathtaking and varied panoramas. You'll visit unique cities such as romantic Mantua. Wrap up your Italian adventure with an enchanting stay in Milan and Lake Como.

itinerary.description: Youll board our ship at 5 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, well introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail. Enjoy a free evening to explore the city on your own.

Morning cruise in the Venice lagoon.Enjoy exploring Buranoknown for its traditional lacemaking and picture-perfect homeson your own.Optional excursion CLASSIC / DISCOVERY : discovery of the island of Murano. Sailing to Venice.
This morning, we offer two optional excursions:- CLASSIC: Guided tour of Doge's Palace and Saint Mark's Square.- DISCOVERY: Dorsoduro district.Enjoy a free afternoon to explore Venice on your own.
Navigation towards Chioggia.Optional CLASSIC/DISCOVERY excursion : PaduaMeanwhile, the boat sails towards Porto Viro(2).Afternoon sailing towards Canda.
Morning cruising to Ostiglia. -CLASSIC: Visit Verona and its amphitheater or the Giusti Gardens.(3) - DISCOVERY: Verona through its gastronomy.

Join us on an optional CLASSIC/DISCOVERY excursion : A guided tour of Mantua, where the House of Gonzaga ruled for almost 400 years. Youre free to do as you please in the afternoon.Or enjoy an optional tour of the Ferrari Museum in Modena (not included in packages).Tonight is our festive gala evening.

Enjoy breakfast on board this morning before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. We'll hit the road for Milan (an approximate 2-hour drive), and upon our arrival mid-morning, we'll enjoy a panoramic tour of the city to get an overview of what it has to offer. We'll have lunch in a local restaurant. The afternoon will be dedicated to discovering the historic center, including a visit to the cathedral. Dinner and accommodations in a 4-star hotel LS in Milan or Lake Maggiore.

ship.name: MS Michelangelo
ship.description: The size of this ship allows it to cruise the Venetian Lagoon and to moor close to Saint Mark's Square!The restaurant is located at the back of the main deck and the lounge / bar at the front. The sun deck with sun loungers is the perfect place to relax and admire the panoramic view of Venice.

title: From the Heart of Alsace to Summits in the Swiss Alps (port-to-port cruise)
description: An unforgettable, exclusive cruise to discover the cultural, architectural, and natural treasures between Alsace and the Swiss Alps. Join us for an invaluable experience, where each day delivers a jackpot of wonders and adventures. Board our ship in Strasbourg, a cosmopolitan, picturesque city with a vibrant past. During your vacation, immerse yourself in the enchanting atmosphere surrounding Strasbourg and its canals, explore Colmar's charming streets, and absorb the captivating artwork at the Hansi Village and its museum. Then, set off for a magnificent journey to snow-capped mountains during an excursion to the Jungfraujoch, where breathtaking views of white summits and sparking glaciers exist all year round. Join us for a once-in-a-lifetime experience combining culture, history, and nature, and guaranteed to leave you with everlasting memories.

title: In the Heart of Basque Terroirs: From Bordeaux to the Vineyards of Médoc (port-to-port cruise)
description: Embark on a unique cruise entirely dedicated to the treasures of the Gironde region. Let yourself be charmed by the surroundings of Bordeaux, combining tastings of emblematic local products with festive entertainment on board. Take advantage of this special getaway to explore the world of wine from a new perspective, in venues as diverse as they are majestic, from Chteau Giscours to La Cit du Vin in Bordeaux, via the Cloister of the Cordeliers in Saint-milion. Turn your journey into a true cultural escape and discover the very best of the Girondes terroir and heritage.

Morning navigation towards Bordeaux. Onboard lecture. Optional excursion: visit the Cit du Vin in Bordeaux with wine tasting. Gala evening.

title: Murmurs of the Loire: A Cruise Through Heritage and Legends (port-to-port cruise)
description: Join us for a cultural interlude and uncover the most beautiful hidden treasures of the Loires heritage. Enjoy this off-the-beaten-path cruise to experience the grandeur of a region enriched by its history, local culture, and gastronomy. From educational visits to breathtaking artistic landmarks, to temples of knowledge within eclectic museums, and local history brought to life through tales and regional folklore, set out to explore a region that never ceases to surprise and enchant.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: Boarding. Presentation of the crew followed by a welcome cocktail.
In the morning, optional excursion to the Maison des Paludiers in Gurande.In the afternoon, cruise towards Nantes.Tasting of typical local products from the region.
In the morning, optional guided tour of Nantes Cathedral and the Chteau of the Dukes of Brittany.In the afternoon, cruise towards Ancenis.Celtic tales and legends evening.

Included full-day excursion: Historic Jewels  Royal Wedding and Monastic Treasures.Departure by coach towards Langeais Castle.Lunch at a restaurant.Visit of the Abbey of Notre-Dame de Fontevraud.Lively evening on board.
In the morning, optional excursion to the Museum of Traditional Trades in Saint-Laurent-de-la-Plaine, Anjou, in Mauges-sur-Loire.In the afternoon, cruise towards Nantes.Gala evening.
Disembarkation.

description: Embark on a festive cruise in the heart of Alsace and Switzerland! Between exceptional craftsmanship and artisanal expertise, culinary traditions, cultural discoveries, and lively dance evenings, each day offers a unique experience. From fascinating museums to a demonstration of the Black Forest cake, Germanys iconic dessert, this cruise celebrates the very best of local craftsmanship, gastronomy, and music. Get ready to savor, discover, and enjoy yourself at every stop.

title: Andalusian Christmas (port-to-port cruise)
description: Enjoy a cruise on the Guadalquivir this Christmas and discover the famous cities of Andalusia such as Seville with its tremendous heritage and old town center that houses fascinating monuments. Explore Cadiz and its surroundings and discover Roman theaters and medieval castles alike.

whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 5:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail before dinner.
This morning, join us on an optional guided tour of Seville, where art and enchantment have left their mark on the city. The afternoon will be spent cruising toward Cdiz on the Guadalquivir.

This morning, join us on an optional guided tour of Cdiz. This marvelous city will surprise you with its cultural and historical richness, famed for the beauty of its unique landscapes. In the afternoon, we'll cruise toward El Puerto de Santa Maria(4). Enjoy a free afternoon or join us on an optional excursion to visit the Osborne Bodega with wine tasting*. Tonight is our Christmas Eve dinner and evening. Midnight mass will be celebrated in El Puerto de Santa Maria(2-3-4).

Join us on an optional excursion to Jerez, the Andalusian capital of wine and horses and the cradle of flamenco music. The afternoon will be spent cruising toward Seville. Tonight is our gala dinner and evening.

Join us on a full-day optional tour of Crdoba, the Caliphs city, influenced by the Arab invasion, full of small wonders and exciting architectural remains. Enjoy some free time before we return to Seville.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.

title: Art and History along the Rhône (port-to-port cruise)
description: Embark on a fascinating journey along the Rhne, where every stop tells the story of the great figures and places that have shaped our heritage. In Lyon, uncover the secrets of French gastronomy at Les Halles Bocuse, a true temple of flavors. Be enchanted by Avignon, the City of the Popes, where the legacy of the pontiffs still resonates within every stone of the Palais des Papes. Step into the artistic world of Arles, where Van Gogh immortalized the light of the South in his vibrant paintings. Along the way, the Baux-de-Provence will captivate you with their Carrires de Lumires, turning art into an immersive experience. Do not miss the Palais Idal du Facteur Cheval, an architectural marvel created by a visionary man who defied convention. At every stop, the Rhne reveals its treasures and its history: art comes to life, and inspiration follows you at every moment.

title: From Portugal to Spain: Porto, the Douro Valley (Portugal) and Salamanca (Spain) (port-to-port cruise)
description: Climb aboard an unforgettable cruise through the magnificent Douro Valley, where each port of call promises captivating adventure and enriching discoveries. Get ready for breathtaking scenery, history-laden locations, and unique experiences in this emblematic region. You'll begin your journey in the lively city of Porto, which oozes an exceptional charm and captivating atmosphere. Next stop will be Regua, where you'll dive into the region's history and winemaking traditions. You'll also cross the border into Spain, for an exciting trip to remarkable Salamanca. For wine connoisseurs, the Port Wine Route will be heaven on earth. You'll wrap up your vacation with stops in Lamego, Guimares, and the charming village of Afuradadestinations packed with cultural heritage, gorgeous architecture, and genuine friendliness.

itinerary.description: Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 5:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail before dinner. In the evening, we'll set out on an optional CLASSIC / DISCOVERY excursion by coach to see Porto by night.

Join us for the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: Guided tour of Porto.DISCOVERY: Touring Porto via tram and visiting the tram museum followed by a tasting of some of the local specialties in the old city.In the afternoon, we'll cruise through the Douro Valley with its fabulous landscapes. Enjoy an evening of dancing or time at leisure in Regua tonight.

Join us on an optional CLASSIC / DISCOVERY excursion: the Casa de Mateus and the Douro museum.We'll leave on foot for the Douro Museum to learn about the passionate history and wine-making heritage in the region, an experience combining traditional and modern approaches. We'll continue on by coach for Mateus Palace, a beautiful 18th-century manor in Vila Real. This baroque-style manor belonged to the same family until a foundation was set up to preserve it in 1970. The dramatic splendor and details of the complex offer a unique visual relationship between geometry and space. Enjoy a stroll through the magnificent tree- and hedge-lined gardens, which include a romantic Mexican-cedar topiary tunnel. After, well return to the ship in Pinho by coach. In the afternoon, the cruise continues to the heart of the most famous vineyards in Porto to Vega de Terron. We'll arrive in the evening. Enjoy an evening of Flamenco entertainment.

Join us for the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: Salamanca. This town of dazzling beauty houses some extraordinary Roman, Arabic, and Christian architectural treasures.DISCOVERY: Salamanca tapas tour.We'll return on board in Barca d'Alva. Enjoy an evening of entertainment.
This morning will be spent cruising. Join us on an optional CLASSIC / DISCOVERY excursion:Port Wine Route and Pinho.  Tonight's our gala dinner and evening.
Join us on an optional CLASSIC / DISCOVERY excursion: Guided tour of Lamego. This afternoon will be spent cruising. Enjoy an evening of Fado-themed entertainment.

This morning, enjoy time at leisure in Porto. In the afternoon, join us for the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: Discover Guimaraes.DISCOVERY: Quaint Afurada.Enjoy an evening of traditional folk entertainment.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9:00 a.m. End of our services.

ship.name: MS Gil Eanes
ship.description: Named after the famous Portuguese navigator, Gil Eanes is a Premium three-deck ship specially designed for the river Douro in Portugal. Launched in 2015, this elegant-designed ship with a bright, modern feel has ample space throughout for passenger comfort with splendid panoramic windows. Its elegant taupe, bronze, and white interior tones combine perfectly with the blue shades and these conjure up the Portuguese tile designs and colours.

title: Beautiful Brittany and Royal Opulence in the Loire (port-to-port cruise)
description: Begin your vacation with an exclusive three-day trip through Brittany, a proud French region with a more-than-thousand-year-old heritage that has spread its influence across the area. From the prehistoric megaliths in Carnac to the wave-beaten coasts of the Quiberon Peninsula, set off on a journey through a stunning region shaped by humans and nature alike. Top off your Breton experience with breakfast in a local crperie and a visit to Auray, a charming village on the Gulf of Morbihan. Then climb aboard for a cruise on the Loire, the royal river with legendary scenery.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: Breakfast will be served at the hotel.This morning, the included excursion is a guided tour of Vannes. Discover the medieval city of Vannes and its fortifications during an urban stroll. Our tour guide will recount the city's history within the confines of the old city walls. This is a great way to learn about the beautiful medieval and Renaissance-style architecture. Your tour will bring you to the Jardin des Remparts, ancient washhouses, Poterne Gate, and Conntable Tower. Step back in time while sauntering through the narrow streets lined with half-timbered homes.We'll enjoy lunch in an authentic crperie. Buckwheat crepes are part of the region's deep heritage. Take part in a genuine cultural experience with a crepe and a bowl of hard cider.After our visit, we'll leave by coach for Nantes,where you'll board our ship at 6 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail. Our ship will begin to cruise towards Saint-Nazaire.

This morning, join us for the optional CLASSIC / DISCOVERY excursion: tour of Saint Nazaire, a town on the sea. We'll visit Escal'Atlantic,a museum that explores the historic ocean liner experience, and the Saint-Nazaire shipyard, one of the largest shipyards in Europe (this excursion must be booked in advance through your travel agency. Each passenger will be asked to produce a valid passport in order to gain access to the shipyard).

This morning, join us for the optional excursions proposed :- CLASSIC : Guided tour of Nantes and the Castle of the Dukes of Brittany.- DISCOVERY: Nantes, the Machines de l'le(3), secret courtyards and covered passageways.This afternoon, join us for the optional excursions proposed :- CLASSIC : The Muscadet Wine Route and Clisson, a charming medieval town.- DISCOVERY: Helicopter ride(2), the Loire from above (this excursion must be booked in advance through your travel agency).

Departure by coach towards the Chteau dAzay-le-Rideau. Built on an island in the middle of the Indre River, the structure as it stands today was erected during the reign of Francis I by a wealthy financier, Gilles Berthelot, who sought to combine Italian innovations with French architectural art. Listed as a historic monument, the Chteau d'Azay-le-Rideau embodies all the refinement of an early French Renaissance chteau. Continuation to Villandry for lunch. In the afternoon, enjoy a stroll through the gardens of the Chteau de Villandry: spread over three levels, they combine aesthetics, diversity, and harmony. Then, visit the Chteau de Villandry. Through its furniture, dcor, and atmosphere, it stands as a living testament to French heritage. The estate of Villandry has evolved over the centuries. Acquired by Jean Le Breton, it transitioned from a medieval fortress to a residence enriched with Renaissance elements. In the 18th century, the Marquis de Castellane transformed it into a comfortable and luminous place, reflecting the art of living of the time. In the 19th century, it was saved by Joachim Carvallo and Ann Coleman, who restored it to its Renaissance state. Today, Henri Carvallo continues this legacy by combining preservation with the enhancement of the site.(The coach transfer time is estimated at approximately 4 hours round trip.)We'll return on board in Chalonnes-sur-Loire.

In the morning, join us for the optional excursions proposed:- CLASSIC: Guided tour of Angers, its historic districts and the famous Apocalypse tapestry(5).- DISCOVERY: Tour of Brissac castle(4) and its cellars complete with a wine-tasting session.We'll return on board.Well spend the afternoon cruising to Ancenis.Tonight is our gala evening. We'll be cruising to Nantes.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast before disembarking at 10:00 a.m. End of our services.

title: Discover Lisbon, Porto and the Douro Valley (port-to-port cruise)
description: Lisbon is a city of incomparable beauty, rich culture, and profound history. Fall under the spell of its pastel-colored homes, blue water, and yellow, retro streetcars. The Portuguese capital is a city that has crossed history with brilliance, perfect combination of a rich past that gives it its charm and attractive modernity. You will enjoy 3 days in Lisbon before joining the POB cruise in the heart of Portugal.
gallery: https://assets.widgety.co.uk/2026/02/20/19/38/27/856c0c5c-9a78-4f2c-b78c-1b1121a8a1aa/CroisiEurope MS Amalia Rodrigues Exterior - Credit - Sergio Albino.jpg
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: Departure by coach to Coimbra, a romantic source of inspiration to many a poet. This afternoon, we'll discover this charming city that cascades down the hillside to the Rio Mondego. After our tour, we'll hit the road again towards Porto. Passengers are welcome to board our ship at 5:00 p.m. After comfortably settling into your cabins, we'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail. In the evening,join us on an optional CLASSIC / DISCOVERY excursion by coach: Tour of Porto "by night".
This morning will be spent cruising. Join us on an optional CLASSIC / DISCOVERY excursion: Guided tour of Lamego. Enjoy an evening of dancing.

Take part in our optional CLASSIC / DISCOVERY excursion: The Douro Museum and a tasting of olive oil and wine in a quinta. We'll spend the afternoon cruising. Enjoy an evening of onboard entertainment.

We'llspend the morning cruising. This afternoon, join us on the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: Guided tour of Porto, one of the oldest cities in Europe, whose historic center was listed as a World Heritage Site by UNESCO.DISCOVERY: Touring Porto via tram and visiting the tram museum. We'll board one of the city's trams and partake in this urban-tourism experience all the way to the mouth of the Douro. We'll finish up our excursion with a tasting of some of the local specialties.The evening is free to do as you please.

Enjoytime at leisure this morning to discover Porto at your own pace. This afternoon, join us for the optional excursions proposed:CLASSIC: Tour of Guimares.DISCOVERY: Quaint Afurada.Tonight's our gala evening and dinner followed by traditional folk entertainment.
Enjoy one last buffet breakfast on board before disembarking at 9.00 a.m. End of our services.

title: Enchanting Christmas Markets along Alsatian Canals (port-to-port cruise)
description: Christmas markets are in full boom during the holiday season. The smell of freshly baked goods fills the air surrounding the festive wooden booths selling artisan gifts. Immerse yourself in the shimmering colors of Little Venice in Colmar, the creative universe of traditional decorations in Kaysersberg, and the age-old charm of Riquewihr.
whats_included: Alcohol and Soft Drinks during Bar hours

itinerary.description: You are welcome to board our ship at 6 p.m. We'll introduce our crew at a welcome cocktail.

We'll spend the morning cruising on the forest- and pasture-lined canal from Colmar to Kunheim.  Enjoy a tasting of Alsatian gingerbread on board. This afternoon, join us for an included excursion: Kaysersberg(1) and Riquewihr. We'll head to Kaysersberg for a Christmas exhibit.(1) Each year, the village goes all out showing the expanse of Alsatian Christmas decorations. Take some time getting into the Christmas spirit by admiring the meticulous, original designs straight from the creators' imaginations. Next stop is Riquewihr, a charming medieval village nestled among the vineyards, where you'll discover an authentic Christmas market in a unique setting. The bright colors of the half-timbered homes add to the postcard-like setting of traditional Alsace. Take your time wandering the cobblestone streets and admiring the marvelous decorations covering the facades and village monuments. We'll return on board the ship. Join us for an evening of Christmas tales and songs.

We'll spend the morning cruising to Colmar. Enjoy the onboard activities during this time. We'll arrive at the end of the morning. This afternoon, join us for an included excursion: Colmar. We'll set out for the center of Colmar. Your guide will first introduce you to picturesque Little Venice. The Lauch River canals wind their way through the city dotted with colorful, half-timbered homes. During the holidays, everything is decorated to the hilt. We'll then visit the Choco-Story chocolate museum, dedicated to the wonders of our favorite sweet, located in Colmar's center of the holiday activity. Warm up with a cup of delightful hot chocolate. Afterwards, spend some time strolling through the Christmas market enjoying what the ambiance has to offer small chalets with traditional Christmas decorations and housewares, original gift ideas, and culinary specialties swathed in spicy holiday smells.    We'll return on board the ship. Tonight is our festive gala evening.
Enjoy breakfast on board this morning before disembarking at 9:00 a.m.

ship.name: MS Jeanine
ship.description: A cruise aboard a canal barge promises a peaceful break where you take the time to discover “la douce France” in a different way. The MS Jeanine, a true cocoon of charm, sails on the French canals and offers its passengers an original and authentic experience.

title: Family Club - The Loire Valley, a Royal legacy (port-to-port cruise)
description: Discover Saint-Nazaire and see the Espadon submarine, the first French submarine to cross under ice. Escal'Atlantic takes you to the depths of the oceans during this experience. Have an unforgettable time either at the Puy du Fou or exploring majestic castles in the Loire. Top it all off with a street art tour in Angers. From its smallest to largest works created in an amazing variety of mediums, we'll jump into the eccentric landscape of the city's urban landscape.
